entry.title: IDC N0001920D0008 (P00035) awarded to RAYTHEON COMPANY, was modified for the amount of $0

entry.title: IDC N0001920D0008 (P00041) awarded to RAYTHEON COMPANY, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MOD IS TO SPLIT CLIN 1006AA AND AB, TO REMOVE CLIN 1006 FROM ATTACHMENTS 4 AND 5, TO ADD CONSIDERATION, AND TO EXTEND THE POP FOR CLINS 1001, 1003, AND 1033 TO 15 JULY 2023.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: GUIDED MISSILE AND SPACE VEHICLE MANUFACTURING
